name: QA 713
description:
PCP QA Test No. 713



Exercise encrypted communications between pmproxy/clients

Copyright (c) 2013 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test in a container, please run:**

    ./build/ci/run.py --runner container --platform centos6 reproduce
